{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Tower of Seven Moons
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Tower of Seven Moons]] is a relic of the southern [[Ashwind continent]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6">''Dreadgod'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Tower of Seven Moons]] is a location loomed over by the [[Titan]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
